name: prism-platform
description: PRISM platform — unified inventory and LSP design

scripts.dev: concurrently -n lsp-api,inv-api,notes-api,web -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev:lsp-api" "npm run dev:inv-api" "npm run dev:notes-api" "npm run dev:platform"
scripts.dev:lsp-only: concurrently -n lsp-api,lsp-web -c cyan,green "npm run dev:lsp-api" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n lsp-api,inv-api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:lsp-api" "cd inventory/backend && npm start"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd platform/frontend && npm install && cd ../../frontend && npm install && cd ../inventory/frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../../notes/backend && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:lsp && npm run test:inventory && npm run test:notes && npm run test:platform
scripts.test:lsp: cd backend && python -m pytest && cd ../frontend && npm run lint && npm run test
